hero.title: Find Your Perfect Alberta Post-Secondary Program
hero.subtitle: AI-powered recommendations to match you with the right program at the right institution

features.title: Powerful Features to Guide Your Journey
features.subtitle: Everything you need to make an informed decision about your post-secondary education

aiMatching.title: AI-Powered Matching
aiMatching.description: Advanced AI analyzes your profile to recommend programs that align with your goals and qualifications.

instantResults.title: Instant Results
instantResults.description: Get your personalized program recommendations in under 60 seconds with detailed matching insights.

prerequisiteChecking.title: Prerequisite Checking
prerequisiteChecking.description: Automatically see which programs you qualify for based on your current education and math scores.

voiceInput.title: Voice Input Support
voiceInput.description: Speak your answers in 8 languages for easier profile creation and accessibility.

labourMarket.title: Labour Market Data
labourMarket.description: View salary ranges and job outlook information for careers related to each program.

pdfExport.title: PDF Export
pdfExport.description: Download your recommendations as a professional PDF to share with advisors and family.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Get personalized program recommendations in three simple steps

step1.title: Create Your Profile
step1.description: Share your educational background, career goals, interests, and qualifications in a simple form.

step2.title: AI Analysis
step2.description: Our AI reviews 106 programs across 10 Alberta institutions to find your best matches.

step3.title: Review Recommendations
step3.description: Receive 10 personalized program recommendations with detailed explanations and next steps.

finalCta.title: Ready to Find Your Perfect Program?
finalCta.subtitle: Start your journey today with AI-powered recommendations tailored to your goals

profile.title: Create Your Profile
profile.subtitle: Tell us about yourself to get personalized program recommendations
profile.privacy: Your privacy is protected - no email required

placeholders.name: Enter your full name
placeholders.careerGoals: What career are you interested in? What kind of work do you want to do?
placeholders.interests: What subjects or activities do you enjoy? What are you passionate about?
placeholders.workExperience: Describe any relevant work experience, internships, or volunteer work

financialAid.maybe: Maybe, I'd like to know my options
financialAid.no: No, I don't need financial aid

profile.privacyNote: Your information is private and secure. No email or personal data is collected.
profile.mathHint: Include course name and grade if available

compare.title: Compare Institutions
compare.subtitle: Select up to 4 institutions to compare side-by-side
compare.noSelectionText: Select institutions above to start comparing

about.title: About APAS
about.description: AI-powered program recommendations to help Alberta students find their perfect post-secondary path.
